name: Andrew McCabe
summary: Former FBI Deputy Director fired by Trump who said the FBI had reason to investigate whether there was an inappropriate relationship between Trump and Russia and that Trump may have obstructed justice.

keyStatements.quote: The president may have been engaged in obstruction of justice in the firing of Jim Comey.
Is there an inappropriate relationship, a connection between this president and our most fearsome enemy, the government of Russia?
keyStatements.context: Explaining why the FBI opened a counterintelligence investigation

keyStatements.quote: I don't care. I believe Putin.
keyStatements.context: Recounting Trump's response to intelligence on North Korea

timeline.significance: Discussed obstruction and counterintelligence probe rationale

credibility.background: Former FBI Deputy Director, 21-year FBI career, led counterterrorism and national security investigations

oppositionReasons: Said Trump may have obstructed justice in the Comey firing
Said the FBI had reason to investigate a possible Trump-Russia connection
Raised concerns about Trump trusting Putin over U.S. intelligence

sources.title: Read the Transcript of Ex-FBI Deputy McCabe's CBS Interview
McCabe says possible 'inappropriate relationship' between Trump, Russia prompted probe
